headline: Session 50 exhausted decision, transaction, diagnostics, module, and responsive work, then repaired the production plain-text asset mount with a self-verifying MIME contract.

items.title: decision-and-transaction-authority
items.evidence: Every runtime shares one pending-decision occurrence contract and clone-then-commit weekly boundary; Commissioner refusal/retry now preserves that authority.

items.title: visible-browser-degradation
items.evidence: A bounded sanitized ledger drives Settings, status, retry, clear, coalescing, and agent-visible browser events from actual failures.

items.title: build-and-responsive-evidence
items.evidence: All 39 retained browser modules are reachable and 20 revision-stamped captures block overflow, runtime errors, low contrast, and undersized critical controls.

items.title: production-asset-mount-contract
items.evidence: Every declared alias now exists, uses a mount-relative asset base, and signature/MIME-verifies CSS, JavaScript, and favicon URLs. Pages run 29805477684 deployed the contract green.

followUps.title: apex-artifact-ingestion
followUps.evidence: The sibling Cloudflare Pages tree still serves a stale hard-coded /games/franchise-architect/ base. Ark receipt 01JU1K4LB3C3400F371FD77B32 requests full mount ingestion from revision f5ecde2; apex styling remains degraded until that sibling deploy lands.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED
blockers.evidence: Edge headers, received email evidence, current deploy provenance, and sibling registry truth remain separate external gates and were not fabricated green.

honestyLedger.title: superseded-failures
honestyLedger.evidence: Commissioner and shard-coverage failures remain diagnostic evidence and were superseded only by explicit root fixes plus full reruns.

honestyLedger.title: visual-tool-limit
honestyLedger.evidence: Twenty automated screenshots passed numeric browser gates, but the separate image viewer failed with CryptUnprotectData and is not claimed as a completed human-like visual review.

honestyLedger.title: cost-discipline
honestyLedger.evidence: All work is local/static and zero variable cost; flat-rate plan accounting is not treated as an alarm.

diffStat.suite: Node 390/390; Playwright 18/18; CI run 29805477767 green; Pages run 29805477684 green; all-mount MIME smoke; responsive evidence 20/20; Genius 0 open / 5 closed
